about_desc: I am a senior student of Game Design and Development (URJC) with a hybrid profile focused on gameplay programming. I combine writing clean and scalable code in Unity (C#) with a strong sensitivity for system design. My greatest strength is acting as a bridge between design and engineering: I am passionate about programming mechanics, rapid prototyping, and implementing complex architectures without losing focus on the player experience.
skills_design_2: • Rapid prototyping of systems and gameplay
skills_design_4: • Clean code architecture (design patterns, SOLID, decoupling)
skills_audio_1: • Sound Design and audio implementation in Unity
skills_audio_2: • Creation and integration of original music
skills_method_1: • Teamwork with Scrum and agile methodologies
p1_short: Garden simulation and resource management with dynamic weather, pests, and plant economy.
p1_tech1: • Event-Driven Architecture: Implemented a fully event-based system (Observer) eliminating massive use of Update(), achieving a notable performance improvement.
p1_tech2: • Spatial Optimization: 2D Matrices + HashSet for efficient plant management and rapid validations.
p1_tech3: • Data-Driven Systems: Scalable architecture design with ScriptableObjects and SOLID principles allowing the team to iterate balancing without recompiling.
p1_gd1: - Design of an interconnected ecosystem with synergies (shade, pollination, biodiversity).
p1_gd2: - Risk/reward economy system with dynamic weather and adaptive difficulty.
p1_gd3: - Visual and tactical feedback through floating animations and terrain changes.
p2_tech1: • Data-Driven and modular system using ScriptableObjects + Strategy Pattern, allowing to create objects and give them behavior without code.
p2_tech2: • Localization Manager: Optimized with Dictionary for ultrafast dialogue access based on temporal phase.
p2_tech3: • Decoupled architecture: Event-Driven (Observer) between UI, Input, and world elements.
p2_gd1: - Narrative progression divided into temporal phases with exploration and varying requirements.
p2_gd2: - Fourth-wall breaking events that increase immersion and tension.
p3_short: Maze game for mobile devices centered on physics (Gyroscope).
p3_tech2: • Restart Optimization: Reset interactive objects via interfaces, achieving instant level restarts without reloading the scene.
p3_tech3: • Editor Tools: Creation of custom tools in Unity that automate level configuration in ScriptableObjects, reducing errors and speeding up design.
p3_ui1: • Level Carousel: Custom sliding menu with smooth animations for fluid navigation.
p3_ui2: • Dynamic Visual Feedback: HUD alert system with a pulsating effect when the timer is near the limit, increasing player tension.
p3_ui3: • Procedural UI: Level cards that generate and configure automatically based on player progress.
footer_cta: Looking for a programmer for your team or next project? Let's talk!
